text:
Author: miwi
Date: Mon Jul 22 15:27:08 2013
New Revision: 323467

Log:
  - Update to 0.17.02

  head/devel/gaphor/files/patch-gaphor__services__componentregistry.py

  head/devel/gaphor/distinfo

Modified: head/devel/gaphor/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/gaphor/Makefile	Mon Jul 22 15:25:58 2013	(r323466)
+++ head/devel/gaphor/Makefile	Mon Jul 22 15:27:08 2013	(r323467)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	gaphor
-PORTVERSION=	0.17.1
+PORTVERSION=	0.17.2
 CATEGORIES=	devel gnome
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP/source/e/etk.docking:docking \
 		CHEESESHOP/source/g/gaphas:gaphas \
@@ -45,8 +45,6 @@ post-extract:
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
 		's|\(Icon=gaphor\).*|\1|' ${WRKSRC}/gaphor.desktop
-	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
-		's|iteable|iterable|' ${WRKSRC}/gaphor/misc/listmixins.py
 
 post-build:
 	@${PYTHON_CMD} -m compileall ${WRKDIR}/${DOCKING_DISTNAME}/lib/etk
